name: record-budget-overrides-shop-default
description: YB-10 rehome (plan task 3.1) of Detector.Tests.ps1's 'a record-level budget overrides the shop default' case (S3.3): elapsed (7200s) exceeds the real shop default (1800s) but the record's own budget (99999s) does not, so the record's budget must win and the state must stay dispatched. budget_source: 'record' added at the C3R-1 fix cycle (spec Amendment 2, issue #22) - even though this exceeds what the default would have been, the SOURCE is 'record' because the record supplied it, never 'default'. (The pure shop-default-application semantic - no record budget at all, an injected default applied - is the separate budget-less-past-injected-default vector, C3R-1b; the REAL-file-resolution detail with no record budget and no injected override stays the carved-out imperative test.) Provenance: OBSERVED - expected block generated by running scripts/Detect-Dispatches.ps1 at repo commit 896e10e on this exact input (2026-07-23), then REGENERATED at the fix-cycle commit adding budget_source, then reviewed for correctness against the pre-existing imperative assertion this vector replaces.
